---
title: "03 bwa-mem2 Alignment"
author: "subhash"
date: "2025-10-15"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Purpose

Align trimmed FASTQ reads to the sorghum reference genome using `bwa-mem2`, then
sort and index BAM files with `samtools`.

# Inputs

- Trimmed FASTQs: `/work/jyanglab/subhash/NEW/1.fastq/trim/*_fastp.fq.gz`
- Sample list: `/work/jyanglab/subhash/NEW/2.alignment/alignment_samples.list`

# Outputs

- Sorted BAMs: `/work/jyanglab/subhash/NEW/2.alignment/<sample>/<sample>.srt.bam`
- BAM indexes and flagstat files in each sample output directory

# Scripts

- `scripts/03_bwa_mem2_alignment/prepare_alignment_array.sh`
- `scripts/03_bwa_mem2_alignment/submit_alignment_after_fastp.sh`
- `scripts/03_bwa_mem2_alignment/alignment_unpaired_array.sh`

# Run

```{bash, eval=FALSE}
cd /work/jyanglab/subhash/NEW
bash scripts/prepare_alignment_array.sh
sbatch --array=1-571%24 scripts/alignment_unpaired_array.sh
```
